case_title: MONCHATRE, RENE VS SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT CONTINENTAL CASUALTY CO C/O CT SYSTEMS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-07-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-07-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER TRIAL PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONCHATRE, RENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS $408.00 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $450.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. JUDGMENT IS FOR THE PERIOD FROM 4-04 THROUGH 04-05 ONLY (PLANE OVERCHARGE) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-27-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-07-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
